label: Qualified applications, net-new demand
name: Michael Schoenfeld
role: Managing Director of Originations, BD Capital
quote: Within 90 days they built an online demand gen engine we simply didn't have before and lifted qualified applications by 32%. Leads now come to us, not the other way around, and many of those first-touch borrowers are still repeat clients today.

label: More qualified consult requests
name: Ameena R. Sheikh
quote: They helped us launch online demand gen from scratch, overhaul our website, and tighten the lead-to-client pipeline. The result is 3x more qualified consult requests and enough steady demand to confidently expand into new practice areas.

label: From zero in digital revenue
name: Craig Percoco
quote: They built our webinar funnels, spun up demand gen across every major platform, and took us from a startup to over $5M a year in digital product revenue. With real attribution and tracking in place, scaling became repeatable, and we've grown into one of the top names in our space.

label: Their trusted D2C growth partner
name: Dawson Taylor
quote: Eric and Rob are an unbelievable team to work with. They handle our marketing and have consistently delivered with professionalism, creativity, and a strong understanding of what drives results. Their expertise in the D2C space really stands out, and they've been a valuable partner for our business. They are responsive, strategic, and genuinely committed to helping their clients succeed. I would highly recommend their services to anyone in the D2C space looking for a marketing team they can trust.
